flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Louisiana Christian University fell 23% between 2021 and 2024 (869 → 672).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Louisiana Christian University rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($17.9k → $20.3k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Louisiana Christian University rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($17.9k → $20.3k).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Louisiana Christian University fell 11% between 2021 and 2024 (58.8% → 52.4%).
